audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds via dual enforcement: P2P validation (validateDenebBeaconBlock L317-333) rejects blocks with count > maxBlobsPerBlock before acceptance, and state transition (verifyBlobCommitmentCount L228-244) validates again during ProcessPayload. Both use params.BeaconConfig().MaxBlobsPerBlock(slot) for epoch-aware limits including BlobSchedule support.
